plan_type_rationale: Single file edit; additive CLI flag; no cross-cutting changes.

tasks.description: Read src/cli/rag-search.ts to understand current parseArgs(), CliArgs interface, formatResult(), and output paths
tasks.success_criteria: Full file contents known; insertion points for flag + truncation identified

tasks.description: Add maxTokens?: number to CliArgs interface
Add --max-tokens flag parsing in parseArgs() switch block
tasks.success_criteria: parseArgs returns args.maxTokens when flag is passed; undefined when absent

tasks.description: Add truncateToTokenBudget(text: string, maxTokens: number): string helper that trims text to approx maxTokens using chars/4 heuristic
tasks.success_criteria: Helper exists; returns original string when maxTokens is undefined/0; truncates with '...' suffix when over budget

tasks.description: Wire truncation into non-JSON output: track running token total across results, stop printing when budget exceeded
tasks.success_criteria: rag-search --max-tokens 4000 stops output within budget; prints truncation notice

tasks.description: Wire truncation into JSON output: truncate result text/content fields before JSON.stringify
Run full test suite: npm test
Commit: feat(rag-search): add --max-tokens truncation flag to bound stdout output
